category_sources: Official Read the Docs page describes fades as automatically creating or reusing virtualenvs and installing dependencies for scripts.
source_facts.description says fades automatically handles virtualenvs for Python scripts.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is `fades`; official documentation title and project references use lowercase `fades`.
docs_sources: Official documentation includes usage, installation, and development sections.
source_facts.homepage is the official Read the Docs documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was determined from official fades documentation, which gives the GitHub clone URL `PyAr/fades`.
tags_sources: Official docs describe dependency installation, requirements files, and script execution inside virtual environments.
